suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Investigate skill discovery mechanism. The backend-worker skill exists at .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md but both workers for milestone 'plugin' reported the skill was not found. This is a systemic issue - skills should be discoverable by workers. Evidence: observability-plugin-architecture and observability-metrics workers both flagged this.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both observability-plugin-architecture and observability-metrics features specified skillName 'backend-worker' but workers reported skill does not exist in available skills list. Yet .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md exists.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document Prometheus metrics conventions. The observability-metrics review noted that AGENTS.md documents ObservableCommand and zap logging but doesn't detail LabeledCounters/CommandMetrics types or Prometheus metric patterns. If future workers extend metrics, they lack guidance.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: observability-metrics review flagged: 'AGENTS.md mentions Metrics: counter y histogram but doesn't detail implementation conventions for Prometheus metrics.'
